data.content: Implementation review rejected. 1. [src/lib/agent-outcome-stats.ts:46] The new stats writer is repo-local only in development; production mode writes to ~/.config/foolery/logs instead of the application working directory, so the feature does not satisfy the storage requirement. 2. [src/lib/terminal-manager.ts:1111] Success classification is broader than specified because it also marks terminal states as success on exit code 0; the requirement limits success to next-queue or prior-queue outcomes only. Verification: bunx tsc --noEmit passed, bun run test passed, bun run build passed. bun run lint did not complete because package.json currently runs bare eslint without a target.
